headline: Will Hilton Worldwide (HLT) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Hilton Worldwide Holdings, Raises Price Target to $367
summary: Barclays  analyst Brandt Montour   maintains Hilton Worldwide Holdings (NYSE:HLT) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $365 to $367.
